Ledger storage

Prune historical data

Old block bodies and undo records are deleted. Headers, the current UTXO set, and transaction/address indexes remain. Archive mode stops future pruning but does not restore deleted data.

Recovery phrase

Anyone with these words can spend this wallet. Keep them offline and private.

    Import encrypted backup

    Enter all 24 words. Existing wallets remain on this device.

    New identity

    Create wallet

    A new wallet becomes active. The current wallet remains available on this device.

    Device storage

    Remove wallet

    Removal deletes this wallet vault from this device. Recovery requires its 24 words or encrypted backup.
